title: Harkinia Palace: Hark the King (80% Tempo)
description:
King Harkinian strives to save Link, no matter the cost.


Continues from "LITTLE RICHER"
https://youtu.be/-ckpjG5fdko

Original Tempo Version
https://youtu.be/WfNjfzmm3ng

Song parodied is "Pandora Palace" from Deltarune by Toby Fox (slowed down from 200 bps to 160 bps for this mix)
https://youtu.be/q-5cXVcCOUs
(Materia Music Publishing as the copyright administrator)

Listen on SoundCloud
https://soundcloud.com/jeff-lindblom/hark-the-king

Support my work
https://www.patreon.com/jefflindblom

*Lyrics*

_Intro_
Listen to me, your majesty
Listen to me, your majesty (there is no time)
Listen to me, your majesty
Listen to me, your majesty (there is no time)
Listen to me, your majesty
Listen to me, your majesty (there is no time)
Listen to me, your majesty
It is written, Link is taken, we must Squadda-leave

Listen to me, your majesty
Listen to me, your majesty (there is no time)
Listen to me, your majesty
Listen to me, your majesty (there is no time)
Listen to me, your majesty
Listen to me, your majesty (there is no time)
Listen to me, your majesty
It is written, Link is taken - HOHOHOHO (it is written)

_Verse 1_
All true warriors strive for peace
How can we protect if we retreat?
My boy needs help, 
my boy needs aid,
My ship sails now,
Time to show 
Why I'm King

All true warriors strive for peace
How can we protect if we retreat?
My boy needs help, 
my boy needs aid,
My ship sails now,
Time to pay
Show _No Mercy_

_Chorus_ (2x)
(All true warriors) Strive for peace
Hearken to me
We don't retreat
I'll set Link free
We strive for peace
Hearken to me
We strive to save Link (HOHOHOHO)

_Bridge_ (2x)
I'm
Going to scrub this land
It's time
Hyrule must take a stand
Dinner can wait.
With triforce in my hands
Too late
Evil has no chance

#ytpmv #deltarune #zelda
